RouteMap.title: Your Bridge to Europe
RouteMap.description: Start your journey at one of our 5 modern preparatory campuses in Tashkent, and seamlessly transition to our flagship academy in Germany.

AlumniCarousel.title: Hear from our Alumni
AlumniCarousel.description: Discover how Target International transformed the academic journeys of students just like you.
AlumniCarousel.quote1: The intensive language preparation was challenging but incredibly effective. Thanks to Target, I was fully prepared for my Data Science Masters at LMU.
AlumniCarousel.quote2: From the visa process to passing the TestDaF, they guided me every step of the way. I couldn't have navigated the German university system without them.
AlumniCarousel.quote3: The Studienkolleg pathway secured my spot in one of Europe's most prestigious technical universities. Highly recommended for anyone serious about engineering.

PathwayQuiz.title: Find Your Germany Pathway
PathwayQuiz.q1: What is your current German language level?
PathwayQuiz.q2: What is your ultimate academic goal?
PathwayQuiz.computingDesc: Analyzing your profile against our programs

ROICalculator.title: Calculate Your Savings
ROICalculator.description: Compare the average total cost of tuition and living expenses for an international student in the USA/UK versus Germany.
ROICalculator.savingsDesc: Based on average international student out-of-pocket costs, excluding potential scholarships.

Hero.subtitle: O'qish · Nemis tilini o'rganish · Kelajagingizni quring
Hero.description: Target International School Germaniyada o'z eshiklarini ochmoqda — Studienkolleg dasturlari, intensiv nemis tili kurslari (A1–C2) va Germaniya davlat universitetlariga to'g'ridan-to'g'ri yo'l. To'lovsiz ta'lim shu yerdan boshlanadi.
Hero.trustLine: Official AP Tutor · Certified SAT Center · College Board Accredited · CEFR-Aligned German Academy

About.title: Mukammallik merosi, endi Germaniyada
About.description1: Target International School 2005-yildan beri ta'limni o'zgartirmoqda. Toshkentdagi 5 ta kampus va 12,000 dan ortiq bitiruvchilar bilan biz Markaziy Osiyodagi eng ishonchli xalqaro maktablardan birimiz — rasmiy AP tutor va tan olingan SAT test markazi.
About.description2: Germaniyaga kengayishimiz tarixiy bosqichni belgilaydi. Biz Yevropaga o'z isbotlangan ta'lim mukammalligimizni olib kelmoqdamiz va talabalarga dunyodagi eng yaxshi oliy ta'lim yo'nalishlaridan birida o'qish imkoniyatini taqdim etmoqdamiz.
About.missionText: Talabalarni yuqori sifatli ta'lim, nemis tili bilimi va Germaniyada bepul davlat universiteti ta'limiga aniq yo'l bilan ta'minlash.
About.visionText: Markaziy Osiyo va Yevropa o'rtasida yetakchi xalqaro ko'prik bo'lib, minglab talabalarga Germaniyaning ajoyib ta'lim tizimiga kirishni ta'minlash.
About.whyGermanySubtitle: Over 400,000 international students already chose Germany. Here's why you should too.
About.reason1Desc: Germaniyaning aksariyat davlat universitetlari xalqaro talabalar uchun ham to'lov olmaydigan. Faqat kichik semestr to'lovi talab qilinadi.
About.reason2Desc: Germaniyada jahon top 500 ga kirgan 46 ta universitet bor, jumladan TU Myunxen, LMU, Xaydelberg va Xumboldt universiteti.
About.reason3Desc: Bitiruvchilar 18 oylik ish vizasini olishadi, bu Yevropaning eng katta iqtisodiyotida ajoyib karyera imkoniyatlarini beradi.
About.reason4Desc: 400,000 dan ortiq xalqaro talabalar bilan Germaniya dunyodagi eng mashhur ingliz tilida bo'lmagan ta'lim mamlakatidir.
About.reason5Desc: Germaniya Yevropa Ittifoqining eng katta iqtisodiyoti va BMW, Siemens, SAP va Bosch kabi global kompaniyalarning vatani.
About.reason6Desc: Yevropaning qalbida o'qing, sayohat va madaniy kashfiyotlar uchun 26 Shengen mamlakatiga oson kirish imkoniyati bilan.

Comparison.title: Why Choose Target International
Comparison.description: We don’t just process applications; we build careers. Here is how our comprehensive approach compares to traditional agencies and language schools.
Comparison.feature3Target: Full end-to-end support including housing & blocked account
Comparison.feature5Target: State-of-the-art European flagship campus in Germany
Comparison.feature5Others: Online only or rented office space

Guidelines.title: Your Roadmap to Success in Germany
Guidelines.description: Navigating a new country can be overwhelming. We provide structured guidelines to ensure you thrive academically and professionally in Germany.
Guidelines.step1Desc: Comprehensive checklist covering visa requirements, blocked account setup (€11,904), and essential documentation.
Guidelines.step2Desc: Mastering the German higher education system, understanding ECTS credits, and effective study techniques for international students.
Guidelines.step3Desc: International students can work up to 140 full days or 280 half days per year. We help you find part-time jobs (Werkstudent) that match your studies.
Guidelines.step4Desc: Guidance on the 18-month job-seeker visa, transitioning to an EU Blue Card, and settling permanently in Europe.

Programs.title: Muvaffaqiyatga olib boradigan yo'llar
Programs.description: Biz sizni Germaniyada akademik va kasbiy muvaffaqiyatga tayyorlaydigan maxsus dasturlarni taklif qilamiz.
Programs.program1Desc: Barcha Germaniya universitetlari tomonidan tan olingan bir yillik tayyorlov dasturi. Feststellungsprüfung ni topshiring va istalgan Germaniya davlat universitetiga to'g'ridan-to'g'ri kirish huquqini oling.
Programs.program2Desc: Umumiy Yevropa amalda qo'llash doirasi (CEFR) bo'yicha intensiv va superintensiv nemis tili kurslari. Boshlang'ichdan mukammallikkacha.
Programs.program2Feature1: Barcha darajalar: A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2
Programs.program3Desc: Rasmiy SAT test markazi va AP tutor sifatida biz jahon bo'ylab universitetga kirish imkoniyatlaringizni maksimal darajada oshirish uchun qattiq imtihon tayyorgarligini taklif qilamiz.
Programs.program4Desc: Biznes boshqaruvi, moliya, axborot texnologiyalari va kompyuter fanlari bo'yicha maxsus kurslar.

German.title: Nemis tilini o'rganing
German.description: Bizning til akademiyamiz CEFR ga muvofiq tuzilgan kurslarni taklif qiladi. Noldan boshlamoqchimisiz yoki universitetga tayyorlanmoqchimisiz — sizga mos kurs bor.
German.levelA1Desc: Asosiy iboralar, tanishuvlar va kundalik vaziyatlar uchun oddiy suhbatlar.
German.levelA2Desc: Oddiy vazifalarni bajaring va yaqin atrofingizni oddiy so'zlar bilan tasvirlab bering.
German.levelB1Desc: Sayohat paytida ko'p vaziyatlarni hal qiling. Tanish mavzularda bog'langan matn yozing.
German.levelB2Desc: Ona tilida gaplashuvchilar bilan ravon muloqot qiling. Murakkab matnlar va akademik ma'ruzalarni tushuning.
German.levelC1Desc: G'oyalarni ravon va o'z-o'zidan ifodalang. Tilni akademik va kasbiy maqsadlarda moslashuvchan foydalaning.
German.levelC2Desc: Deyarli hamma narsani tushuning. Turli manbalardan ma'lumotlarni umumlashtiring va dalillarni qayta tuzing.
German.intensiveDesc: Haftasiga 20 soat — har bir daraja uchun 8 hafta.
German.superIntensiveDesc: Haftasiga 30 soat — har bir daraja uchun 6 hafta.
German.eveningDesc: Haftasiga 8 soat — har bir daraja uchun 14 hafta.
German.examPrepDesc: Germaniya universitetiga kirish uchun zarur til sertifikatini olishga yordam beruvchi maxsus kurslar. Bizning o'tish darajamiz 92% dan oshadi.

Opportunities.title: Imkoniyatlar dunyosini oching
Opportunities.description: Germaniya universitetidan olgan diplom butun dunyo bo'ylab eshiklarni ochadi.
Opportunities.uni1Desc: Germaniyaning 1-raqamli universiteti. Muhandislik, tabiiy fanlar va texnologiyada jahon yetakchisi.
Opportunities.uni2Desc: Yevropaning eng qadimiy va nufuzli tadqiqot universitetlaridan biri.
Opportunities.uni3Desc: Germaniyaning eng qadimiy universiteti, 1386-yilda tashkil etilgan.
Opportunities.uni4Desc: 57 Nobel mukofoti sovrindorlarining vatani. Berlinning qalbidagi akademik mukammallik mayoqi.
Opportunities.uni5Desc: Yevropaning muhandislik va texnologiya tadqiqotlari bo'yicha yetakchi texnik universiteti.
Opportunities.uni6Desc: Gumanitar, ijtimoiy va tabiiy fanlar bo'yicha yetakchi tadqiqot universiteti.
Opportunities.pathway1: Germaniyada 18 oylik o'qishdan keyingi ish vizasi
Opportunities.pathway2: Malakali mutaxassislar uchun EU Blue Card
Opportunities.pathway4: STEM, IT va biznes bitiruvchilariga yuqori talab
Opportunities.pathway5: 2 yillik ishdan keyin doimiy yashash huquqi

Campus.title: Bizning global tarmoq
Campus.description: Toshkentdan Berlinga — kampuslarimiz jahon darajasidagi o'qish uchun zamonaviy sharoitlarni taqdim etadi.
Campus.germanyDesc: Bizning Yevropa flagmani — Germaniya qalbidagi zamonaviy o'quv markazi.
Campus.germanyFeature3: Talabalar dam olish xonasi va hamkorlik maydonlari
Campus.germanyFeature4: Ajoyib transport aloqalari bilan markaziy joylashuv
Campus.tashkentDesc: Toshkentdagi 5 ta kampus, har biri turli akademik yo'nalishlarda ixtisoslashgan.
Campus.qoraqamishDesc: STEM Innovation Hub — Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics

Admissions.title: Germaniyaga sayohatingizni boshlang
Admissions.description: Qabul jarayonimiz oddiy va qo'llab-quvvatlashga mo'ljallangan. Har bir qadamda sizga yordam beramiz.
Admissions.step1Desc: Akademik yozuvlaringiz va shaxsiy bayonotingiz bilan onlayn ariza shaklini to'ldiring.
Admissions.step2Desc: Akademik baholash va qabul jamoamiz bilan shaxsiy suhbatda ishtirok eting.
Admissions.step3Desc: Qabul xatingizni oling va bizning yordamamiz bilan talabalar vizasi uchun ariza jarayonini boshlang.
Admissions.step4Desc: Kampusimizga keling, yangi muhitga joylashing va transformatsion sayohatingizni boshlang.
Admissions.formDesc: Quyidagi shaklni to'ldiring va qabul jamoamiz 24 soat ichida siz bilan bog'lanadi.
Admissions.success: Ariza muvaffaqiyatli yuborildi! 24 soat ichida siz bilan bog'lanamiz.

Footer.aboutText: Target International School — 2005-yildan beri jahon darajasidagi ta'lim orqali Markaziy Osiyo va Yevropani bog'lovchi ko'prik. Germaniyada o'qish yo'lingiz shu yerdan boshlanadi.
Footer.rights: Barcha huquqlar himoyalangan. Target International School.
